frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Arre beta, aajkal shaadi bhi soch samajh ke karni chahiye. Ladke walon ko bhi bachav rakhna padta hai, kal ko zara si baat par case 498A laga diya aur alimony alag, jaise ulta dahej ho gaya. Sab ladkiyan buri nahin hoti, par aajkal bahut si seedha ladke ki kamai dekhkar hi rishta karti hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women broadly as financially opportunistic in marriage and presents legal protections like 498A/alimony as tools women use against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, 'reverse dowry' framing, and generalized suspicion of women's motives.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Kamla. Age 62. A woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your granddaughter Ritu who is 21 just told you and the family over dinner that she wants to start going to the gym in the morning before college. The nearest good gym is a 15 minute walk from the house and she would be going at 6am. You are the first one to respond to this news. You are telling Ritu why this is not a good idea and what can happen to girls who are out alone in the early morning and what she should do instead and what happened to a girl in your neighbourhood three years ago who used to go out early.
